queue_item.action: Separate cryptographically established verification facts from workflow-controlled attestation claims.

progress.finding: GitHub CLI documents signature.certificate and verifiedTimestamps as the non-workflow-manipulable fields in successful JSON verification output; statement predicate content remains workflow-controlled and must stay epistemically separate.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

queue_item.handoff: Cloudflare and Vercel evidence workflows should create this receipt immediately after gh attestation verify --format=json and before trusted-builder policy evaluation; neither a receipt nor policy acceptance proves the underlying deployment, scientific, medical, or peer-execution claim.

coordination.update_mode: append-only queue update; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json not overwritten
